creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Michele Possamai <possamai@xs4all.nl> -----

From: Michele Possamai <possamai@xs4all.nl>
To: FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org, freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org
Cc: Michele Possamai <possamai@xs4all.nl>
Subject: Re: ports/135435: Upgrade of the NetXMS port to the most recent
	version.

That's odd,

I copied the original netxms dir to netxms.old, adjusted the original port, 
did a diff -ruN against the old and new version and attached that diff to  
the pr..

I wonder what went wrong. Should I provide the complete dir in some other  
way?

Kind regards,
M. Possamai

----- End forwarded message -----
